description_long: This is a two-story detached house with a gable roof, clad in light gray siding and featuring boarded-up windows and doors, suggesting it is abandoned or under renovation. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a dirt or gravel yard, surrounded by several mature trees and bushes that partially obscure the structure. A winding white pathway leads from the front yard to the main entrance, which is elevated and accessed by a short set of steps. To one side, there is a detached garage or shed with a flat roof, and a white van is parked nearby, further emphasizing the residential context. The windows and doors are mostly covered with wooden boards, and there is a visible brick chimney on the roof. The overall appearance is weathered, with muted colors and a utilitarian design, typical of older suburban or rural American homes.
description: A weathered two-story house with a gable roof, boarded windows and doors, surrounded by trees, a detached garage, and a parked van on a dirt yard.
description_view_0: Front-right view showing the main entrance with steps, dense foliage, and the winding path leading to the door.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the boarded-up main entrance, the van parked in front, and the detached garage to the right.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the back of the house, the van, and the garage, with fewer visible windows and more open yard space.
description_view_3: Direct rear view showing the back wall with boarded windows, dense trees, and the garage on the left.
attribute_entryway_design: Boarded main door with steps, no porch, minimal decorative elements
